outreach_subject: A quick note ahead of Building Luxury Beverly Hills

replies.subject: Re: A quick note ahead of Building Luxury Beverly Hills
replies.body:
The Real Deal Events team is on site for our annual NYC Real Estate Forum on Wednesday, May 6. 

Our registration team will be happy to assist you with locating your registration onsite at The Metropolitan Pavilion, located at 125 West 18th Street between 6th and 7th Avenues. 

Power Breakfast ticket holders may enter the building at 9 am. Doors open for the main event at 10 am. 

For other questions related to the event, please visit our FAQs here: 
https://events.therealdeal.com/new-york/faq
